subject: A young male warrior with dark upswept hair powers up with arms raised, a large glowing energy sphere forming above him
suspected_ip: Son Gohan — Mystic/Ultimate form (Dragon Ball Z)
description: A young male humanoid figure stands in a wide action stance with arms raised or spread, body turned slightly forward. The figure has dark upswept hair without a Super Saiyan golden glow, wearing what appears to be a dark gi. A large luminous spherical energy formation hovers above and around the figure, radiating white-blue light. Teal and electric-blue energy streaks radiate outward in all directions. The background is lost in the energy field's glow. The composition is a mid-shot centered on the powering-up figure. The mood is intense and awe-inspiring, suggesting a transformative power release.
foreground: young dark-haired warrior in gi, arms raised in power-up stance
background: glowing energy sphere and electric-blue aura streaks
emotion: intense focus and exertion — body fully committed to the power surge
